description: Targetvalidation.org was the legacy home of the Open Targets Platform, a resource for exploring evidence linking therapeutic targets to diseases and phenotypes. Current public product access appears to have moved to opentargets.org and its subdomains.
summary: No developer integration surfaces were found on targetvalidation.org itself; the legacy domain appears to have been replaced by Open Targets surfaces on opentargets.org subdomains, including a public GraphQL API and an MCP server with undocumented auth.
